title: Physics Modpack
description: A modpack that includes physics mod and performance mods so it runs well on many hardware.
body:
# Disclaimer
**The physics mod itself can only be download from the creator because of copyright reasons!**

Modrinth (Free version): [https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod)

Creators Patreon (Paid version): [https://www.patreon.com/Haubna](https://www.patreon.com/Haubna)

Note: The creator now gives the pro version for free too, but its only avalible for download on his patreon. Also this modpack if you dont install physics mod seperatly is just a performance modpack.

The Physics Mod version to download is any version compatible with Fabric and the current Minecraft version the pack you downloaded has.

## Main Description

With this modpack the game becomes realistic in a way that it feels really good, for example TNT when blows up creates a big smoke cloud, blocks collapse if there are no support structure, caves can collapse on you and the water has relalistic physics too including boats and many many more



<details>
<summary>Old Description if you are interested</summary>
With this modpack the game will be realistic, water will have physics, trees will fall when you break the bottom, when you mine in a cave it can collapse on you, if a creeper or a TNT blows up it will have smoke and the water will have realistic waves etc.
</details>



Also if you have a suggestion for the logo of the project feel free to make a Suggestion ticket on the [discord](https://discord.gg/9gxCyuPbma) server
